channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

Fly tipping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Croyland Road, Edmonton

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 3rd May
item.description:
This bed base mattress etc was dumped there by the occupants of No 56 Arthur Grove at 9.30am on Sunday 3rd May.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arthur Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree looks dead, 3rd May
item.description:
The tree looks dead and might become a danger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansunt Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Homeless Person Unit, 3rd May
item.description:
This person requires to be vacated from the area as accommodation. There is a Charity Crisis and Shelter 100 yards away . The person is becoming abusive and a nuisance causing a disturbance clearly . Also has been stalking local residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter cages overflowing, 3rd May
item.description:
The newsagents next to the barbers and Bakery have several cages of litter and litter building up around them. Why are these cages sitting on the pavement near the railway fencing? Why can’t the newsagents keep these cages in their premises so not on display? If iIts windy the rubbish floats everywhere? There is litter in the alley next to these cages and behind them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sette dumped, 3rd May
item.description:
Furniture dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Southborough Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sink unit and material, 3rd May
item.description:
I think it’s a sink unit with added mfi material. Outside the chemist in Pickford lane. Sitting on pavement as you enter the chemist.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By bus stand Claremont road, 3rd May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped here - all the pavements near need a deep clean - it also stinks of urine!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Corner of Claremont by railway smells horrible of urine, 3rd May
item.description:

item.title: Bollards knocked down., 3rd May
item.description:
This has been like this for months! The yellow restrictions barriers keep falling down. Looks unsightly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goddard Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 3rd May
item.description:
Please empty, thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daly Drive, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of cardboard left in recycling bins in Penge East car park, 3rd May
item.description:
These bins were out in to help with the paper and cardboard recycling. However, as you can see they are overloaded and have not been cleaned for days. They are being misused and making people not use the green recycling banks but rather dump their recycling in a horrible manner as you can see in the photos. Please arrange for these to be cleared asap. This is absolutely revolting and the Council should be accountable for this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bookcase outside 2 Valmar Road flytipped, 3rd May
item.description:
Bookcase flytipped outside 2 Valmar Road, has been there for the last 2 weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Valmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins on pavement, open bins, general household waste outside., 3rd May
item.description:
Bins constantly blocking pavement. Other items discarded at front of property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 379, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
